message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Push commit immediately per discipline rules">
The commit is already made (9cdc020) but NOT pushed. Per commit discipline rule #2: push immediately after every commit. Please run `git push` RIGHT NOW, then verify CI with `gh run list --limit 1`. Do not wait or do anything else first.
</teammate-message>
